name: jseverino-com
description: Personal site for Joe Severino — built with Astro, sourced from a private notes vault, served on Cloudflare Pages.
author: Joe Severino

scripts.build: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.publish:check: npm run clean:generated && npm run sync:content && npm run check && npm run build && npm run clean:conflicts && npm run audit:assets
